label: lane-registry-weights
claim: Lane weights (explicit_author 0.42 / lexical 0.28 / graph_causal 0.13 / derived_generated 0.12 / semantic_shadow 0.05, all live:true) live in LANE_DEFINITIONS; env-overridable via SPECKIT_ADVISOR_LANE_WEIGHTS_JSON

label: fusion-weighted-sum
claim: Fusion point is a raw-score weighted SUM (weightedScore = rawScore*weight; score = reduce(+)) at fusion.ts:366,372 — not RRF, not rank-based; this is the Q2 comparability surface

label: ranking-tiebreak-fragile
claim: Ranking sorts by (score+commandBonus+intent) then confidence then localeCompare; score is toFixed(6) — float rounding, not a fixed-order deterministic sum

label: livetotal-normalization
claim: liveTotal sums live-lane weights; liveNormalized = score/liveTotal feeds confidence — raw weighted sum is also the normalization base

label: no-query-class-router
claim: No query-class router exists; intent enters via TASK_INTENT/breadth regexes (confidence/abstention) and a per-(phrase,skill) primaryIntentBonus table at sort time — hardcoded, not a class->lane-weight map

label: graph-causal-bfs
claim: graph_causal lane is BFS over projection edges, maxDepth=2/maxBreadth=4, EDGE_MULTIPLIER enhances0.55/siblings0.35/depends_on0.35/prerequisite_for0.30/conflicts_with-0.35, depth decay 1/(depth+1), prune <0.05, output clamped [-1,1]; negative conflict contributions preserved at emit but not enqueued

label: watcher-location
claim: File watcher/reindex lives in lib/daemon/ (watcher.ts, watcher-orchestrator.ts, lifecycle.ts); freshness rebuild at lib/freshness/rebuild-from-source.ts — located, internals not yet read

label: trust-state-vocab
claim: Trust states are exactly live|stale|absent|unavailable (ADVISOR_HOOK_FRESHNESS_VALUES), mapped 1:1 to SharedPayloadTrustState; freshness state machine emits them

label: aionforge-query-class-router
claim: aionforge: 5 QueryClasses (SingleHopFactual/MultiHop/Temporal/Entity/Quote) -> per-signal RetrievalProfile weights (HEAVY1.0/MODERATE0.6/LIGHT0.3/OFF0.0) + behavior flags; heuristic regex, most-specific-first; misclassification degrades gracefully; class reported in explanation

label: aionforge-rrf-k60
claim: aionforge deterministic RRF: fused = weighted sum of 1/(k+rank+1), k=60; fusion reads only RANK (BM25 vs cosine not comparable); zero weight elides signal entirely; fixed-order sum by Signal + node-id-ascending tiebreak via total_cmp = byte-identical output

label: aionforge-graceful-degrade
claim: aionforge: embedder unreachable => dense signal returns empty ranking, never fails recall; degrade-not-error reported via embedder_available:false — analog for graph-unavailable graph_causal lane

label: aionforge-beta-posterior
claim: aionforge reliability-weighted Beta posterior: attester contributes r in [0,1] (r correct / 1-r against) over prior; posterior bounded (alpha+k)/(alpha+beta+k); cold-start uninformative 0.5 => nothing promotes — bounded anti-overfit shape

label: aionforge-path-correction
claim: aionforge docs do NOT exist at repo-root external/; live copy resolves under parent spec folder .opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/028-memory-search-intelligence/external/aionforge-memory-development/docs/. Use this path in later iterations

label: query-class-router-additive
claim: A small class->per-lane-weight router injected at effectiveScorerWeights() (fusion.ts:69-82) would generalize the hardcoded primaryIntentBonus table while keeping explicit_author dominant (additive, not a substitute). Risk: false-positive misroute demoting the right skill (aionforge retrieval.md:137-143). Needs held-out routing-quality check

label: deterministic-rrf-fixes-comparability
claim: Current weighted sum mixes incomparable raw scales (text-overlap vs clamped graph [-1,1] vs cosine); deterministic RRF (k=60, zero-weight elision, fixed-order sum, node-id tiebreak) addresses both comparability and the fragile toFixed(6)/localeCompare determinism. Caveat: graph_causal NEGATIVE conflict contributions have no rank-fusion meaning (retrieval.md:90-92) so a naive port drops conflict suppression — must preserve as re-rank or separate signal
